title: taraxacum nigrocephalum
intro: Taraxacum nigrocephalum, also known as the black-headed dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues and promote liver health. The plant's leaves and roots contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, offering health benefits such as reducing swelling, improving digestion, and supporting kidney function. Taraxacum nigrocephalum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including jaundice and skin conditions.
